untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of current stock against other stocks in the same industry (relative strength/peer comparison). This cross-instrument relative analysis is not available in single-instrument indicator list. Pattern identification (EEDB double bottom) also requires candlestick pattern recognition which is not in the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Translated core logic: downtrend confirmation via price regime and RSI < 40 indicates potential bottom formation. Exit on breakout above 20-day MA (typical double bottom breakout behavior). However, the critical condition 'other stocks in industry showing bullish patterns' cannot be operationalized with single-stock indicators only. Author parameters show 78% success rate for upside breakout and 40% average rise, supporting LONG direction with moderate hold period.
